desc: Exports all filters applied to the active view (with their complete settings) to a JSON file at a user-chosen destination.
summary: Exports all filters applied to the active view (with their complete settings) to a JSON file at a user-chosen destination. Uses GetViewFilterSettings to extract filter data. For model-wide filter export, use ExportModelFiltersCommand instead.
usecase: User wants to export/backup view filter settings for review or comparison.
notfor: Modifying filters (use CreateFilters/AddFilterToView). Model-wide export (use ExportModelFiltersCommand).
precondition: Active document and view must be open.
postcondition: JSON file written to disk with full filter settings.

outputs.name: totalFilters
outputs.description: Total filters exported from the active view

outputs.name: filePath
outputs.description: File path the JSON was saved to

preprompts: Exporting view filter settings to JSON...
Saving filter settings from the active view...
thinkingsteps: Reading filters from the active view...
successprompts: Done — view filter settings saved to {filePath}.
